meta.title: Self-Esteem Test
meta.description: A 500-statement self-reflection assessment covering 20 dimensions closely related to self-esteem.

levels.label: Strong & Secure Self-Regard
levels.desc: Your responses suggest a stable sense of worth, healthy self-respect, and confidence that can withstand ordinary setbacks.

levels.label: Generally Grounded
levels.desc: Your self-regard appears broadly healthy, with a few situations where doubt or external pressure may still have influence.

levels.label: Developing Self-Esteem
levels.desc: You show meaningful strengths alongside areas where kinder self-talk, boundaries, or confidence could be strengthened.

levels.label: Self-Esteem Under Strain
levels.desc: Your responses suggest that self-doubt may be affecting several areas. Gentle support and focused practice may be helpful.

levels.label: Consider Extra Support
levels.desc: You may be experiencing persistent low self-regard. Consider talking with a trusted person or qualified mental-health professional for support.
